title: [MEDIUM] Clear stale rejectionDetails on reason-only QA rejection
description: Deep sweep finding: packages/moe-daemon/src/tools/qaReject.ts only writes `rejectionDetails` when structured feedback is provided. If a task previously had structured details and a later QA rejection is reason-only, the tool response says `rejectionDetails: null` but the task retains stale old details in state, misleading future workers and get_context/claim_next_task.
definitionOfDone: Reason-only qa_reject explicitly clears any previous rejectionDetails from the persisted task.
Structured qa_reject still stores current failedDodItems/issues and replaces old details atomically.
Regression test covers structured rejection followed by reason-only rejection and verifies get_context/claim response no longer expose old details.
packages/moe-daemon npm test and build pass.

implementationPlan.description: Update qaReject so reason-only rejection explicitly clears previous rejectionDetails while structured rejection replaces them atomically; preserve existing validation error handling.
implementationPlan.note: qa_reject now always persists rejectionDetails in the task update payload: structured feedback stores/replaces current details, while reason-only rejections write null to clear stale details. Targeted qaReject tests passed: npm test -- --run src/tools/tools.test.ts -t "moe.qa_reject" (15 passed, 156 skipped).

implementationPlan.description: Add regression test: reject with structured details, resubmit/re-review, reject reason-only, then verify stored task/get_context/claim_next_task no longer expose old details.
implementationPlan.note: Added regression covering structured rejection replacement, then reason-only rejection clearing persisted details, and verification through get_context plus claim_next_task. TDD red verified by temporarily restoring old conditional persistence: new test failed with stale details; restored fix and qaReject targeted suite passed (16 passed, 156 skipped).

implementationPlan.description: Run targeted qaReject/getContext/claim tests plus daemon test/build validation.
implementationPlan.note: Final verification complete. Adversarial review of relevant diff found intended null-clearing semantics only: reason-only writes null, structured writes object, existing validation/races unchanged. Tests/build: targeted qaReject/get_context/claim_next_task suite passed (45 passed, 127 skipped); full packages/moe-daemon npm test passed (25 files, 454 tests); npm run build passed; git diff --check on affected files passed with existing line-ending warnings only.

comments.author: architect-2992
comments.content: Token-budget check: clearing stale rejectionDetails should prevent old issue blobs from resurfacing in get_context. Tests should verify reason-only rejection does not retain bulky stale details.

planningNotes.approachesConsidered: Preferred: always include `rejectionDetails: rejectionDetails ?? null` in updatePayload. Rejected: leave stale details and rely on reopenReason because workers consume both fields.
planningNotes.codebaseInsights: qaReject returns `rejectionDetails: null` when no structured feedback is provided, but updatePayload omits the field, so StateManager preserves old task.rejectionDetails.
planningNotes.risks: Need distinguish omitted structured feedback from explicit empty arrays. Fix should not erase details when current rejection includes issues/failedDodItems. Include error handling for invalid issue payloads.
